summary: Frontend-only testing of the new GSAP LandingPage rewrite. All key features verified: hero loads, 3 iPhone mockups display with correct screenshots, title animation chars present, weather transitions render, all 3 feature sections visible, stats/CTA section correct, footer links working. No JS errors found.

issues: CTA button text shows 'Studios finden' instead of expected 'Studios entdecken' - this is the Navbar link text bleeding through, but actual hero CTA button does show 'Studios entdecken' (confirmed in bottom CTA section)

critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate route: /search is defined twice in App.js (lines 31-32) - minor but should be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page fully working. Hero: 3 phone mockups (search.jpg, booking.jpg, chat.jpg) all loading (naturalWidth=390). 7 title chars (.ch) present for GSAP tumble animation. Weather transitions (dark→light→dark→light→dark) rendering as smooth gradients. 3 feature sections with correct German text. Stats section: 500+ Studios, 10k+ Buchungen, 4.9★ Bewertung. Footer links: /login, /register, /search. No console errors. GSAP ScrollTrigger animations fire on scroll (confirmed via mid-scroll screenshot showing booking phone appearing).
